CustomField.label: Requires Passing Check
CustomField.description: Optional. Enter the Record Name (API Name / DeveloperName) of another active check in the same Check Set that must PASS before this check runs - this is the value shown in the Name column / Record Name field in Setup, NOT the Check Name users see. The prerequisite must have a lower Run Order. If it does not pass, this check is skipped. A value that does not match an existing rule also causes this check to be skipped silently at runtime; it is reported only when the Check Set configuration is validated, not when you save this record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Optional. The Record Name (API Name) of an earlier check (lower Run Order) in this Check Set - shown in Setup, not the Check Name. If it fails or the name does not match a rule, this check is skipped.
